events.command: node - <<'NODE' const fs=require('fs'); const p='data/content/analysis/image-descriptions/2026-03-image-description-queue.json'; const q=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); const counts=q.items.reduce((a,i)=>{a.total++; a[i.agentStatus]=(a[i.agentStatus]||0)+1; return a;},{total:0}); console.log(JSON.stringify({status:q.status, counts, described:q.items.filter(i=>i.agentStatus==='described').length, needsHumanReview:q.items.filter(i=>i.agentStatus==='needs_human_review').length, needsDescription:q.items.filter(i=>!i.agentStatus || i.agentStatus==='needs_description').length}, null, 2)); NODE
